lab.title: Lab 01 - Manage Microsoft Entra ID Identities

steps.title: Sign in to Azure Portal
steps.instruction: Sign in to the Azure portal - https://portal.azure.com. To proceed to the portal, select Cancel on the Welcome to Azure splash screen.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Navigate to Microsoft Entra ID
steps.instruction: Search for and select Microsoft Entra ID. Select the Overview blade and then the Manage tenants tab. Return to the Entra ID page by pressing back in the browser or selecting the option in the breadcrumb menu.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Create new user az104-user1
steps.instruction: In the Manage blade, select Users; then in the New user drop-down select Create new user. Create a new user with User principal name: az104-user1, Display name: az104-user1, Auto-generate password checked, Account enabled checked, Job title: IT Lab Administrator, Department: IT, Usage location: United States.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Invite external guest user
steps.instruction: In the New user drop-down select Invite an external user. Configure with your email address, your name as display name, check Send invite message box, add message 'Welcome to Azure and our group project', set Job title to IT Lab Administrator, Department to IT, Usage location to United States.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Navigate to Groups section
steps.instruction: In the Azure portal, search for and select Microsoft Entra ID. In the Manage blade, select Groups. Take a minute to familiarize yourself with the group settings in the left pane.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Create IT Lab Administrators group
steps.instruction: In the All groups blade, select + New group and create a new group. Set Group type to Security, Group name to 'IT Lab Administrators', Group description to 'Administrators that manage the IT lab', Membership type to Assigned.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Add group owner
steps.instruction: Select No owners selected. In the Add owners page, search for and select yourself (shown in the top right corner) as the owner.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Add members to group
steps.instruction: Select No members selected. In the Add members pane, search for and select the az104-user1 and the guest user you invited. Add both of the users to the group. Select Create to deploy the group.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle

steps.title: Verify group and membership
steps.instruction: Refresh the page and ensure your group was created. Select the new group and review the Members and Owners information.
steps.aiResponse: Error after 3 attempts: Timeout after 180000ms waiting for session.idle
